posts.author: Supernoob3000 (Supernoob3000)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I can install and edit the github example apps, however these each have numerous files / folders. I am therefore unsure what all I need to include if I was to create my own app from scratch. For example I read I need to include an index.html beyond the code file itself. Is there some guide showing which files at a minimum are required for uploading a monday app for it to work?

Any help appreciated. Like if there would be a guide that is SUPER simple like: This is how to make a widget that just makes a green box. It has 2 files etc.
